title: Plesiagopus rotundifolia
taxonomy: Plesiagopus rotundifolia belongs to the family of cave-dwelling arthropods, specifically within the class of arachnids, and is further classified as an order of spiders. The order to which Plesiagopus rotundifolia belongs is called Araneomorphae, and within this order, it is classified as a family called Agelenidae.
